description:
Locations: secretx-pkcs11/src/lib.rs:625 (.unwrap() in unit test), 633 (.unwrap()), 639 (.unwrap()), 668 (.unwrap()), 719 (.expect("from_uri should succeed")), 720 (.expect("get should succeed")), 739, 741, 746, 749-750, 755, 757, 759, 766, 768-769, 771.

These are all in #[test] / #[tokio::test] functions. .unwrap() / .expect() in tests is idiomatic — failed unwrap surfaces as test failure with line info, which is exactly what tests want.

No flag for production code: lib.rs has no .unwrap() or .expect() outside tests. That's clean.

This finding is filed only to mark "I checked and there is nothing to fix here" — closing it as not-an-issue is the expected outcome. Useful as a positive checkpoint.
title: No production .unwrap()/.expect() outside tests; checkpoint, no action needed
